scale-unlimited/declaration-strict-value.message: Use design tokens: var(--wp--preset--color--*) / var(--wp--custom--*) instead of raw colors (see theme.json).

selector-class-pattern.message: Expected class selector to be a lowercase, hyphenated name, optionally with a BEM __element or --modifier (e.g. "site-header__toggle").

custom-property-pattern.message: Expected custom property name to be kebab-case, with WordPress's "--" namespace separators allowed (e.g. "--wp--preset--color--base").
